name: Greater Poland Voivodeship (Poland)

colors.symbolism: the historic field of Greater Poland
the silver of the Greater Polish eagle

description: Red field charged at centre with the crowned silver eagle of Greater Poland.
history: Adopted by the Greater Poland Voivodeship after its formation in 1999, restoring the medieval heraldic device of the historic region.

features.symbolism: the historic field colour of Greater Poland

features.role: the Greater Poland eagle, crowned, with golden beak and claws
features.symbolism: the historic emblem of the Greater Poland region, the cradle of the Polish state
